zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gorsuch於1539年4月24日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親Lord Humphrey Gorsuch29歲，母親Eme Hillson27歲。他於1566年8月4日與Avice Hillson在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 亞特 希爾 煙雨 聖 安德魯 賀伯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年5月14日在英國藍卡爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gorsuch于1539年4月24日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，他的父亲Lord Humphrey Gorsuch29岁，母亲Eme Hillson27岁。他于1566年8月4日与Avice Hillson在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 亞特 希爾 煙雨 聖 安德魯 賀伯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年5月14日在英国藍卡爾享年37岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Gorsuch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the hamlet of Gorsuch, Lancashire, earlier Gosefordsich, from Old English Gōsford ‘goose ford’ + sīc ‘small stream’.
History: This name is first recorded as that of a manor near Ormskirk held by Walter de Gosefordsich in the late 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Gorsuch was born on 24 April 1539, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Humphrey Gorsuch, was 29 and his mother, Eme Hillson, was 27. He married Avice Hillson on 4 August 1566, in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 May 1576, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gorsuch est né le 24 avril 1539, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Humphrey Gorsuch, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eme Hillson, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Avice Hillson le 4 août 1566, à London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1576, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gorsuch am 24. April 1539 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Humphrey Gorsuch 29 und seine Mutter Eme Hillson 27. Er hat am 4. August 1566 in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England Avice Hillson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1576 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Lancashire, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gorsuch è nato il il 24 aprile 1539 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Humphrey Gorsuch, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eme Hillson, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Avice Hillson il 4 agosto 1566, nel London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1576, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Gorsuchが1539年4月24日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Humphrey Gorsuchは29歳，母Eme Hillsonは27歳であった。1566年8月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト マリー アト ヒル ウィス スト アンドリュー ハバードでAvice Hillsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1576年5月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアで37歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gorsuch(이)가 1539년 4월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Humphrey Gorsuch(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eme Hillson(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1566년 8월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 앳 힐 위스 스트 앤드루 후브바드에서 Avice Hillson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 5월 14일 영국 랭카실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gorsuch nasceu em 24 de abril de 1539, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Humphrey Gorsuch, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eme Hillson, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice Hillson em 4 de agosto de 1566, em London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1576, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gorsuch родился 24 апреля 1539 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Humphrey Gorsuch было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eme Hillson, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice Hillson 4 августа 1566 г. в местности лондон ст мэри ат хилл вит ст андрю хуббард, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 мая 1576 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gorsuch nació el 24 de abril de 1539, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Humphrey Gorsuch, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eme Hillson, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Avice Hillson el 4 de agosto de 1566, en London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1576, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
